title: Traffic Stop Drug and Firearm Arrest Records

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Ohio Open Records Law, I hereby request the following records:

Pursuant to the Ohio Public Records Act, I request all releasable public records related to traffic stops from January 1, 2025 to present that resulted in the seizure of illegal narcotics, firearms, or both. This request includes:

Body-worn camera footage
Dash camera footage
CAD/dispatch logs
Arrest reports
Incident reports
Evidence photographs
911 calls, if applicable

I request that all records be provided electronically if available.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

SAD Footage

title: Traffic Stop Drug and Firearm Arrest Records

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Ohio Open Records Law, I hereby request the following records:

Pursuant to the Ohio Public Records Act, I am requesting all releasable public records related to a traffic stop that resulted in the discovery of illegal narcotics and/or a firearm.

Please include:

* Body-worn camera footage
* Dash camera footage
* 911 calls
* CAD/dispatch logs
* Incident reports
* Arrest reports
* Evidence photographs
* Radio communications
* Search warrant records (if applicable)
* Jail booking records

I request that all records be provided electronically if available.

If there are any fees associated with this request, please notify me in advance before processing.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

SAD Footage

To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Ohio Open Records Law, I hereby request the following records:

Pursuant to the Ohio Public Records Act, I am requesting all releasable public records related to a disorderly conduct, disturbance, trespassing, or refusal-to-comply incident that resulted in police interaction and body-worn camera footage.

Please include:

* Body-worn camera footage
* Dash camera footage
* 911 calls
* CAD/dispatch logs
* Incident reports
* Arrest reports
* Radio communications
* Witness statements, if releasable

I am particularly interested in incidents occurring at businesses, retail stores, restaurants, pools, parks, airports, hotels, or other public locations where officers responded to a disturbance, trespassing complaint, or disorderly conduct complaint.

I request that all records be provided electronically if available.

If there are any fees associated with this request, please notify me in advance before processing.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

SAD Footage

communications.subject: North Carolina Public Records Law Request: Contract Request: Interfolio
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the North Carolina Public Records Law, I hereby request the following records:

The most recent contract, governing, base, or master license agreement with Elsevier relating to the licensing of Interfolio;
All related terms and conditions, terms of service, amendments, addenda, appendices, attachments, product terms, MOUs, MOAs, data processing agreements, and/or letters of intent; 
All financial documents or records of financial transactions, exchanges or obligations related to the contractual relations with Elsevier for faculty information system technology;
and
Assessment documentation including, but not limited to, the Higher Education Community Vendor Assessment Toolkit (HECVAT). 

Responsive materials include all contracts, agreements, amendments, appendices, invoices, and any other documents listed above that incorporate language governing terms of use of Interfolio.

The scope of this request should encompass more than just direct contracts or renewals between the university and Elsevier; please incorporate all applicable agreements and supporting records facilitated through consortium entities (such as Lyrasis).

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

mo

title: Disorderly Conduct and Body Camera Records

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Ohio Open Records Law, I hereby request the following records:

Pursuant to the Ohio Public Records Act, I am requesting all releasable public records related to a disorderly conduct, disturbance, trespassing, or similar incident involving an adult female or male subject, including:

- Body-worn camera footage
- Dash camera footage
- 911 calls
- CAD/dispatch logs
- Incident reports
- Arrest reports
- Witness statements
- Radio communications
- Jail booking records (if applicable)

I request that all records be provided electronically if available.

In the event that there are fees, please inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

SAD Footage

title: Traffic Stop Drug and Firearm Arrest Records

communications.communication:

Pursuant to the Ohio Open Records Law, I hereby request the following records:

Pursuant to the Ohio Public Records Act, I am requesting all releasable public records related to a traffic stop and arrest involving illegal narcotics and/or firearm possession that occurred on or about [DATE], including:

- Body-worn camera footage
- Dash camera footage
- 911 calls
- CAD/dispatch logs
- Incident reports
- Arrest reports
- Search warrant records (if applicable)
- Evidence photographs
- Radio communications
